signal.description: diapr.ai eng_director Codex turn repeatedly marked stdout_attach_failed/ghost while subprocess is running

evidence.value: Repo: /Users/shivamtiwari.highlevel/VS Code/1008apps/diapr.ai. Run ID: run_0b00ed1aa694dda8. Turn ID: turn_37119b33570569d2. Phase: implementation. Events show repeated turn_start_failed/stdout_attach_failed and run_blocked for local-eng-director at 2026-05-02T02:42:35Z, 02:45:42Z, 02:48:48Z, 02:51:55Z with recommendation to run agentxchain reissue-turn --turn turn_37119b33570569d2 --reason ghost. However full-auto subsequently runs agentxchain step --resume --turn turn_37119b33570569d2 --verbose and a Codex subprocess is alive: /Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources/codex exec -m gpt-5.5 ... PID 96764. full-auto.log contains Codex stdout after the failure. agentxchain status shows active turn status=starting with stale failed_start_at/failed_start_reason while blocked_on=null. Looks like watchdog can mark a Codex local_cli turn as ghost/stdout_attach_failed even though output arrives later, and state does not clear failed_start metadata.
